creator: glewis@eyesbeyond.com
text:
On Sun, Apr 15, 2012 at 10:29:54PM +0000, Adrian Huryn wrote:
> maven-install:
>      [java] [INFO] Scanning for projects...
>      [java] Downloading: http://repository.jboss.org/maven2/org/jboss/jboss-parent/4/jboss-parent-4.pom
>      [java] Downloading: http://maven.glassfish.org/content/groups/glassfish/org/jboss/jboss-parent/4/jboss-parent-4.pom
>      [java] 185b downloaded
>      [java] [WARNING] *** CHECKSUM FAILED - Checksum failed on download: local = '6c9fd3d150b8a5f0ca676f49b8ed603793cabebb'; remote = '<html                                                                                              >
>      [java] <head><title>301' - RETRYING
>      [java] Downloading: http://maven.glassfish.org/content/groups/glassfish/org/jboss/jboss-parent/4/jboss-parent-4.pom
>      [java] 185b downloaded
>      [java] [WARNING] *** CHECKSUM FAILED - Checksum failed on download: local = '6c9fd3d150b8a5f0ca676f49b8ed603793cabebb'; remote = '<html                                                                                              >
>      [java] <head><title>301' - IGNORING
>      [java] [INFO] ------------------------------------------------------------------------
>      [java] [ERROR] FATAL ERROR

Looks like an issue with the download.  Probably a 301 error judging by the
HTML fragment being spat out.
